text: SHARE is a multiday multiculture survey that aims at addressing the major societal challenges emerging from demographic change. What is the European way of ageing? How will Europeans manage economically, socially and physically? Are these domains connected in some way? The multidisciplinary team of authors of this volume have further improved the capacity of the SHARE survey to address these questions and thereby to underpin policy to achieve greater societal inclusion.
